# Spectroradiometer

**Summary**: An instrument used to measure the spectral reflectance of materials in situ.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] used a spectroradiometer to collect data for 21 different types of waste materials.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- A library of 21 common materials was created, showing that while shapes are similar, variations in amplitude occur due to source and purity issues. ([[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022, p. 48]])
